# `api.jobs.tracking.v3`

> `GET /v3/job/{jobDisplayId}/tracking/{historyAmount}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.tracking.v3(job_display_id: int, history_amount: int = 10) -> TrackingInfoV3
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs tracking v3 <job_display_id> <history_amount>
```

``GET /v3/job/{jobDisplayId}/tracking/{historyAmount}``

## Query parameters — `TrackingV3Params`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `historyAmount` | `Optional[int]` | no | Number of tracking history entries to return |

## Response

Returns `TrackingInfoV3`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `trackingDetails` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Detailed tracking entries |
| `carrierInfo` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Carrier metadata |
| `shipmentStatus` | `Optional[str]` | no | Overall status |
| `statuses` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Status entries with date, code, message, carrierProps |
| `carriers` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Carrier information list |
